column1: Course Creator Academy,Course Creator Academy is a content creation education platform to help students enhance their videography skills.,E-Commerce,https://github.com/cochranfilms/cochran-films-landing/blob/3e356e1eacda5bfd00b02415e3dc94646676cc40/CMS/Thumbnails/Web%20Development/CCA_Live_Website.png,TRUE,2024-08-31,https://coursecreatoracademy.org/,"Shopify (Online Store 2.0), Liquid, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (custom scripts), Shopify API, Shopify App Integrations (for forms, memberships, and payments), Google Analytics, SEO Optimization Tools","Full-Stack Developer & Systems Architect — handled the full build, theme customization, app integrations, and backend configuration for course management","Course Creator Academy (a division under CLC Collective, founded by Cody Cochran)","4 weeks — from initial planning to launch, including testing and Shopify API integrations","
column3: Integrating a multi-tier membership structure using Shopify’s native system plus third-party apps
Creating a responsive design optimized for both education content and service promotion
Ensuring seamless checkout flow for both physical merchandise and digital/in-person course purchases
Configuring SEO and analytics tracking for both static and dynamic content pages","•
column4: Fully functional education & services platform with automated onboarding for new students

column3: Streamlined payment and course access flow that reduced manual admin by 60%
Increased lead capture rate via optimized inquiry and sign-up forms
Solid foundation for future app integration and scaling course offerings online"

column1: Cochran Films,"A Wix Studio-based dynamic website for Cochran Films, designed as a central hub for its video portfolio, service offerings, and client inquiry funnel. Includes category-based video showcases, automation, and backend CRM integrations.",Media Services,https://github.com/cochranfilms/cochran-films-landing/blob/e3cd354bbb9a92a30bda77c24e8acf72f1f0bb36/CMS/Thumbnails/Web%20Development/CF_Live_Website.png,,2024-01-01,https://www.cochranfilms.com ,"Wix Studio CMS, Velo by Wix (custom code & API integrations), JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Google Analytics, SEO Tools, Elfsight, ManyChat, Mailchimp Integration","Full-Stack Web Developer & Media Systems Designer — handled site architecture, portfolio CMS collections, API integration, and UX optimization for client acquisition",Cochran Films (CLC Collective’s flagship media production company),"6 weeks — included planning, CMS setup, media library build-out, integrations, SEO setup, and launch","
column3: Building a scalable video portfolio CMS to handle multiple categories (events, commercials, corporate, education, etc.)
Optimizing site speed and media playback performance with a large video library hosted through Wix Video
Integrating backend tools (inquiries, invoicing, booking) into the frontend experience without breaking UI consistency
Ensuring SEO visibility for both static and dynamic pages while maintaining a branded, cinematic design aesthetic","•
column4: Centralized, dynamic portfolio showcasing diverse video categories with high-quality playback

column3: Increased client inquiries by 45% after launch through optimized inquiry funnels and booking integrations
Streamlined backend operations with CRM integrations, invoice management, and lead capture automation
Established Cochran Films’ online presence as a full-stack media powerhouse and scalable platform for future services"

column1: BOSS Academy — Youth Film Education Portal,"An educational microsite built under Course Creator Academy for BOSS Academy, designed to empower youth through hands-on film and content creation programs. The platform highlights program offerings, schedules, and resources while serving as a recruitment and informational hub for students and parents.",Education,https://landing.cochranfilms.com/CMS/Thumbnails/Web%20Development/BOSS_Live_Website.png,TRUE,08/01/2025,https://landing.cochranfilms.com/CMS/Thumbnails/Web%20Development/BOSS_Live_Website.png,"Wix Studio CMS, Velo by Wix, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Google Forms Integration, Cursor, Google Analytics, SEO Tools","Full-Stack Web Developer & Education Platform Designer — handled full build, CMS configuration, event/program pages, and integrations for sign-ups and communication",BOSS Academy (in partnership with Course Creator Academy / CLC Collective),"3 weeks — from concept to launch, including testing and parent/student onboarding setup","
column3: Creating a simple, user-friendly portal for both parents and youth audiences
Integrating sign-up and communication flows with existing CCA backend
Ensuring scalability for future educational programs and community events
Maintaining brand consistency between CCA’s main site and BOSS Academy subsite","•
column4: Successfully launched a youth-focused educational portal within 3 weeks

column3: Increased parent/student engagement through simplified sign-up forms and communication channels
Provided a branded online hub to support BOSS Academy’s growth and credibility
Strengthened Course Creator Academy’s community outreach and nonprofit partnerships"
